name: Stir-Fry Springdish (Roergebakken Lenteschotel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lean pork into very small strips.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
3. Add the pork and stir-fry until browned, stirring constantly.
4. Add ginger powder and garlic, and continue stir-frying for 2 minutes.
5. Add the pods, sesame seeds, catsup, vinegar, sugar, and cherry tomatoes.
6. Stir-fry for another 2 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
7. Season with salt to taste.
8. Serve hot.
